summary: Autonomous inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, raise_pr, or close actions are planned because the job disables merge/fix/raise_pr and the fix artifact disables instant and low-signal closeout. Open PRs are kept for maintainer review or independent follow-up; the one hydrated security-sensitive linked PR is routed to central security handling only.
